settings.title: The True Next Generation
settings.description: The 290 GP redefines boundaries. Shattering the planar limitations of conventional wheels through its revolutionary 3D ergonomic architecture, it reinvents Formula-style steering with multi-layered structural innovations, relentlessly pushing the limits of immersive sim-racing experiences.

settings.title: Race-Proven Carbon-Aluminium Structure
settings.description: Engineered with motorsport-grade process and materials, the 290 GP features a pressure molded carbon fiber front plate (1,400g) paired with a forged 6061-T6 aluminum body. This structural fusion achieves high rigidity at 40% reduced mass, translating to precise force feedback transmission and zero flex during endurance sessions.

settings.title: Spatial Thumb Operating Zone
settings.description: CONSPT's 3D button layout aligns ergonomically with natural thumb positions, creating a purpose-built control matrix. Through spatial stacking of buttons, it achieves 40% higher input density than planar designs, enabling intuitive blind-operation accuracy even under intensive races.

settings.title: TPU EnduroGrips™, Race-Validated Durability
settings.description: The 290 GP EnduroGrips are engineered to endure 1,000+ hour endurance sessions through high-spec TPU construction, delivering 3x the durability of standard TPE grips. Its anti-fatigue contours ensure sustained tactile precision during marathon driving sessions.

settings.title: Tactile Racing Geometry
settings.description: Dual-compatible with 2/3-finger lower grip styles, the 290GP steering wheel features a race-optimized core holding area functionally divided to match natural hand curvature. Its specially designed lower contour amplifies "wheel-pushing" control through geometry-tuned contact surfaces and force transmission efficiency.

settings.title: ErgoTouch™ Modular RGB Ergonomic Buttons
settings.description: The 290GP employs modular self-contained buttons with localized rigidity and tactile consistency, paired with precision-tuned actuation force/travel for balanced feedback. SimHub-ready RGB lighting dynamically visualizes telemetry data, while CONSPIT Link 2.0 enables granular LED customization.

settings.title: ThumbClick™ Encoder, Precision at the Top End
settings.description: ONSPIT Exclusive Design: Ergonomically optimized for thumb use with triple precision tuning—diameter, resistance, and trigger feel—for enhanced control and reduced accidental inputs.

settings.title: "MagFlip" F1-type Magnetic Shifting
settings.description: The MagFlip rocker paddle system adapts Formula racing's dual-action (push/pull) shifting to sim rigs, paired with a magnetic system that delivers tactile feedback while replicating real-world race car functionality.

settings.title: Ready-to-go Dashboard
settings.description: The 290GP integrates a 4.3'' high-res dashboard (800×480/500nit/60fps) with custom-designed racing telemetry layouts for instant data visualization, with proprietary dynamic pop-up display to synchronize with drivers' inputs and in-car adjustments.

settings.title: Quick-Con Adapter with Independent USB Connection
settings.description:
- Standard 70mm PCD adapter, ensuring broad compatibility with various options.

- Heavy-duty quick connector ensures stable, reliable connections.

- Comes with a detachable coiled cable featuring a direct USB connection.

settings.title: CDP/CDR Quick Release (Optional)
settings.description:
The 290 GP is optionally compatible with the CDP quick-release system for direct connection to the CONSPIT ARES wheelbase. 

It features a Formula-inspired CNC-machined 7075 aluminum clasp and ball locking design, with the clasp handling torque transmission and the balls ensuring precise longitudinal positioning. Spring contacts provide EMI-resistant electrical stability, outperforming wireless systems. Optimized contact geometry reduces ball wear, ensuring zero-play durability under extreme loads.
